scripts.dev: npx concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "cd backend && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: node scripts/preflight.js && cd frontend && npm install && echo '✓ Frontend ready' && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && echo '✓ Backend ready'
scripts.sync: cd backend && python -c "import asyncio; from app.sync import run_full_sync; asyncio.run(run_full_sync())"
scripts.reset: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('path').join(__dirname,'hackathon.db'); if(fs.existsSync(p)){fs.unlinkSync(p);console.log('Database deleted. Run npm run dev to re-sync from Shopify.')}else{console.log('No database found — nothing to reset.')}"
